Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.http.response.HttpResponseMessage

Packages that use HttpResponseMessage
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.http.response
Next-generation HTTP response types.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg
REST Method Argument Beans
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.beans
REST Interface Helper Classes
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.validation
Optional Jakarta Bean Validation 3.x integration for juneau-rest-server — declarative validation of request beans via jakarta.validation.constraints.* annotations.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    Accepted
    Represents an HTTP 202 Accepted response.
    class 
    AlreadyReported
    Represents an HTTP 208 Already Reported response.
    class 
    BadGateway
    Represents an HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error response.
    class 
    BadRequest
    Represents an HTTP 400 Bad Request error response.
    class 
    BasicHttpException
    Base class for HTTP error response exceptions (4xx and 5xx) in the org.apache.juneau.http stack.
    class 
    BasicHttpResponse
    Base class for concrete HTTP response objects in the org.apache.juneau.http stack.
    class 
    Conflict
    Represents an HTTP 409 Conflict error response.
    class 
    Continue
    Represents an HTTP 100 Continue response.
    class 
    Created
    Represents an HTTP 201 Created response.

    Represents an HTTP 103 Early Hints response.

    Represents an HTTP 417 Expectation Failed error response.

    Represents an HTTP 424 Failed Dependency error response.

    Represents an HTTP 403 Forbidden error response.

    Represents an HTTP 302 Found response.

    Represents an HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout error response.

    Represents an HTTP 410 Gone error response.

    Represents an HTTP 505 HTTP Version Not Supported error response.

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg that implement HttpResponseMessage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ArgException
    General exception due to a malformed Java parameter.

  • Uses of HttpResponseMessage in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth that implement HttpResponseMessage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AuthenticationException
    Specialization of Unauthorized thrown by BearerTokenGuard, ApiKeyGuard, and user-supplied TokenValidator / ApiKeyStore implementations to signal AuthN failure.

  • Uses of HttpResponseMessage in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.beans

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.beans that implement HttpResponseMessage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SeeOtherRoot
    Convenience subclass of SeeOther for redirecting a response to the servlet root.

  • Uses of HttpResponseMessage in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.validation

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.validation that implement HttpResponseMessage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ValidationException
    Specialization of BadRequest thrown by BeanValidator when one or more Jakarta Bean Validation constraints on a @Content, @FormData, or @Request-bound parameter are violated.
